See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 9370 => 'AWCC', 9371 => 'AWCC', 9372 => 'Roshan', 9373 => 'Etisalat', 93744 => 'Afghan Telecom', 93747 => 'Afghan Telecom', 93748 => 'Afghan Telecom', 93749 => 'Afghan Telecom', 9375 => 'Afghan Telecom', 9376 => 'MTN', 9377 => 'MTN', 9378 => 'Etisalat', 9379 => 'Roshan', ];
